children.text: Conversation 1: Helen's Birthday
Today is 3rd December. Happy birthday, Helen!
children.cn: 今天是12月3日。生日快乐，海伦！
children.speaker: Fu Xing
children.notes: December 3rd: 12月3日；Happy birthday: 生日快乐
children.statement: 今天是12月3日，是海伦的生日。
children.explanation: 付兴说'Today is 3rd December. Happy birthday, Helen!'。

children.text: Thank you, Fu Xing!
children.cn: 谢谢你，付兴！
children.speaker: Helen
children.notes: Thank you: 谢谢你
children.statement: 海伦向付兴致谢。
children.explanation: 海伦回答'Thank you, Fu Xing!'。

children.text: How old are you?
children.cn: 你多大了？
children.speaker: Fu Xing
children.notes: How old: 几岁，多大年龄
children.statement: 付兴在询问海伦的年龄。
children.explanation: How old are you? 是询问年龄的标准句型。

children.text: I'm 15. And you?
children.cn: 我15岁了。你呢？
children.speaker: Helen
children.notes: 15 = fifteen
children.statement: 海伦今年15岁。
children.explanation: 海伦说'I'm 15.'，表示她15岁。

children.cn: 我13岁。
children.speaker: Fu Xing
children.notes: 13 = thirteen
children.statement: 付兴比海伦大两岁。
children.explanation: 付兴13岁，海伦15岁，付兴比海伦小两岁。

children.text: When is your birthday?
children.cn: 你的生日是什么时候？
children.speaker: Helen
children.notes: When is...: 询问时间
children.statement: 海伦询问付兴的生日日期。
children.explanation: 海伦用'When is your birthday?'询问付兴的生日。

children.text: On 22nd August.
children.cn: 在8月22日。
children.speaker: Fu Xing
children.notes: August 22nd: 8月22日
children.statement: 付兴的生日在8月22日。
children.explanation: 付兴回答'On 22nd August.'。

children.text: So can you come to my birthday party?
children.cn: 那么你能来参加我的生日派对吗？
children.speaker: Helen
children.notes: come to my birthday party: 来参加我的生日派对
children.statement: 海伦邀请付兴参加她的生日派对。
children.explanation: 海伦问'can you come to my birthday party?'。

children.text: Sure! When is it?
children.cn: 当然！是什么时候？
children.speaker: Fu Xing
children.notes: Sure: 当然；When is it: 是什么时候
children.statement: 付兴拒绝了海伦的邀请。
children.explanation: 付兴说'Sure!'表示接受邀请，并询问具体时间。

children.text: At 6 o'clock this evening.
children.cn: 在今天晚上6点。
children.speaker: Helen
children.notes: 6 o'clock: 6点整；this evening: 今天晚上
children.statement: 派对在今天晚上6点举行。
children.explanation: 海伦说'At 6 o'clock this evening.'。

children.text: I'd love to come!
children.cn: 我很乐意去！
children.speaker: Fu Xing
children.notes: I'd love to: 我很乐意做某事
children.statement: 付兴很高兴能去参加派对。
children.explanation: 'I'd love to come!'表达了非常乐意参加意愿。

children.text: Conversation 2: Gift for Dad
Ella, can you help me? I want to give my father a birthday gift.
children.cn: 埃拉，你能帮帮我吗？我想送给我爸爸一件生日礼物。
children.speaker: Teng Fei
children.notes: give sb a gift: 送给某人一件礼物
children.statement: 腾飞想给他的父亲准备生日礼物。
children.explanation: 腾飞说'I want to give my father a birthday gift.'。
children.highlight: can you, help me, give, birthday gift

children.text: Oh, that's sweet, Teng Fei! When is his birthday?
children.cn: 喔，那太体贴了，腾飞！他的生日是什么时候？
children.speaker: Ella
children.notes: sweet: 贴心的，体贴的；When is his birthday: 他的生日是什么时候
children.statement: 埃拉觉得腾飞很贴心。
children.explanation: 埃拉赞扬说'Oh, that's sweet, Teng Fei!'。

children.text: On 9th January, next month.
children.cn: 在下个月的1月9日。
children.speaker: Teng Fei
children.notes: January 9th: 1月9日；next month: 下个月
children.statement: 腾飞爸爸的生日在下个月的1月9日。
children.explanation: 腾飞说'On 9th January, next month.'。

children.text: That's soon! You can make a card for him.
children.cn: 快到了！你可以为他做一张卡片。
children.speaker: Ella
children.notes: make a card: 制作卡片
children.statement: 埃拉建议腾飞为爸爸制作一张卡片。
children.explanation: 埃拉建议'You can make a card for him.'。
children.highlight: soon, make a card, for him

children.text: That's a good idea!
children.cn: 真是个好主意！
children.speaker: Teng Fei
children.notes: good idea: 好主意
children.statement: 腾飞采纳了埃拉的建议。
children.explanation: 腾飞赞同道'That's a good idea!'。

children.text: Conversation 3: Surprise for Ms Gao
Meimei, when is Ms Gao's birthday?
children.cn: 梅梅，高老师的生日是什么时候？
children.speaker: Peter
children.notes: Ms Gao: 高老师（女性）
children.statement: 彼得想知道高老师的生日。
children.explanation: 彼得问'Meimei, when is Ms Gao's birthday?'。

children.text: Why do you ask?
children.cn: 你为什么问这个？
children.speaker: Meimei
children.notes: Why do you ask: 你为什么问
children.statement: 梅梅问彼得询问的原因。
children.explanation: 梅梅反问'Why do you ask?'。

children.text: Because I want us all to give her a surprise.
children.cn: 因为我想让我们大家给她一个惊喜。
children.speaker: Peter
children.notes: give sb a surprise: 给某人一个惊喜
children.statement: 彼得想大家一起给高老师一个惊喜。
children.explanation: 彼得说明原因'Because I want us all to give her a surprise.'。
children.highlight: Because, want, give her a surprise

children.text: Sounds fun! Her birthday is on 12th June.
children.cn: 听起来很有趣！她的生日是在6月12日。
children.speaker: Meimei
children.notes: June 12th: 6月12日；Sounds fun: 听起来很有趣
children.statement: 高老师的生日在6月12日。
children.explanation: 梅梅说'Her birthday is on 12th June.'。

children.text: Let's sing a song for her. I'll play the guitar.
children.cn: 我们为她唱首歌吧。我来弹吉他。
children.speaker: Peter
children.notes: sing a song: 唱歌；play the guitar: 弹吉他
children.statement: 彼得打算弹吉他为高老师唱歌。
children.explanation: 彼得建议'Let's sing a song for her. I'll play the guitar.'。
children.keywords: sing a song, play the guitar

children.text: Great idea!
children.cn: 太棒的主意了！
children.speaker: Meimei
children.notes: Great idea: 太棒的主意了
children.statement: 梅梅赞同彼得的提议。
children.explanation: 梅梅称赞道'Great idea!'。

children.text: Part 1: Surprise Party Idea
Hi, Peter! It's Ella and Emma's birthday soon. How about a surprise party for them?
children.cn: 嗨，彼得！很快就是埃拉和艾玛的生日了。给他们办一个惊喜派对怎么样？
children.notes: surprise party: 惊喜派对；how about: ……怎么样(用于提建议)
children.statement: 腾飞提议为埃拉和艾玛办一个惊喜派对。
children.explanation: 腾飞说'How about a surprise party for them?'，建议办惊喜派对。
children.highlight: It's, soon, How about, for them

children.text: Good idea! Let's go and buy something for the party this weekend.
children.cn: 好主意！我们这周末去为派对买点东西吧。
children.notes: Good idea: 好主意；this weekend: 这周末
children.statement: 彼得不同意腾飞的提议。
children.explanation: 彼得回答说'Good idea!'并提议这周末去买东西，表示赞同。
children.highlight: Let's, buy something, for the party

children.text: Part 2: Buying Birthday Cake
Good morning. Can I help you?
children.cn: 早上好。有什么我可以帮您的吗？
children.notes: Can I help you?: 我能帮您吗？(商店售货员常用招呼语)
children.statement: 女售货员礼貌地询问他们是否需要帮助。
children.explanation: 'Can I help you?'是服务行业常用的礼貌用语。

children.text: Yes, please. How much is this birthday cake?
children.cn: 好的，谢谢。这个生日蛋糕多少钱？
children.notes: How much is...: 询问单数物品价格
children.statement: 腾飞想知道生日蛋糕的价格。
children.explanation: 腾飞通过'How much is this birthday cake?'来询问价格。

children.text: We have a sale today. It's 85 yuan, and it comes with some candles.
children.cn: 我们今天有特价活动。它是85元，并且附赠一些蜡烛。
children.notes: have a sale: 降价出售，打折；come with: 附带，伴随
children.statement: 蛋糕今天不打折，且不送蜡烛。
children.explanation: 售货员说今天有特价(have a sale)，蛋糕是85元且附带蜡烛(comes with some candles)。

children.text: Part 3: Buying Oranges & Yogurt
Good, we'll take it. How much are those oranges?
children.cn: 好的，我们要了。那些橙子多少钱？
children.notes: we'll take it: 我们要了，买下了；How much are...: 询问复数物品价格
children.statement: 彼得决定买下蛋糕，并询问了橙子的价格。
children.explanation: 彼得说'we'll take it'决定购买蛋糕，接着问'How much are those oranges?'。
children.highlight: we'll take it, How much are

children.text: Six yuan a kilo. How many kilos do you want?
children.cn: 六元一千克。你想要多少千克？
children.notes: six yuan a kilo: 每公斤六元；How many: 询问数量
children.statement: 橙子的价格是每瓶六元。
children.explanation: 橙子的价格是每公斤(a kilo)六元，不是每瓶。
children.highlight: a kilo, How many, do you want

children.text: Five kilos, please. Teng Fei, how about some yogurt?
children.cn: 请来五千克。腾飞，来点酸奶怎么样？
children.notes: how about: ……怎么样(用于提建议)
children.statement: 彼得要了五千克橙子，并提议买酸奶。
children.explanation: 彼得要了'Five kilos'，并问腾飞'how about some yogurt?'。

children.text: Sure. How much is the yogurt?
children.cn: 好的。酸奶多少钱？
children.notes: Sure: 当然，好的
children.statement: 腾飞不同意买酸奶。
children.explanation: 腾飞回答'Sure.'表示同意，接着询问酸奶的价格。

children.text: Five yuan a bottle.
children.cn: 五元一瓶。
children.notes: five yuan a bottle: 每瓶五元
children.statement: 酸奶的价格是每瓶五元。
children.explanation: 售货员明确说'Five yuan a bottle.'。

children.text: 10 bottles, please. What's the total?
children.cn: 请拿10瓶。总共多少钱？
children.notes: total: 总数，合计
children.statement: 腾飞决定买10瓶酸奶并询问总额。
children.explanation: 腾飞要了10瓶，并问'What's the total?'(总计是多少)。

children.text: 165 yuan.
children.notes: 165 yuan: 一百六十五元
children.statement: 他们买东西的总额是150元。
children.explanation: 售货员计算出的总额是165元（蛋糕85元 + 5公斤橙子30元 + 10瓶酸奶50元 = 165元）。

children.text: Here you are.
children.cn: 给你。
children.notes: Here you are: 给你(递物时的常用语)
children.statement: 腾飞把钱递给售货员。
children.explanation: 'Here you are'是把东西或钱递给别人时的习惯用语。

children.text: Thank you! Have a nice day!
children.cn: 谢谢！祝您今天愉快！
children.notes: Have a nice day!: 祝你今天愉快(常用于道别)
children.statement: 售货员礼貌地祝愿他们今天愉快。
children.explanation: 售货员说'Have a nice day!'表达了美好的祝愿。

children.text: Thanks. You too.
children.cn: 谢谢。您也一样。
children.notes: You too: 你也是，您也一样
children.statement: 彼得和腾飞也祝愿售货员今天愉快。
children.explanation: 他们回答'Thanks. You too.'，表示同样的祝愿。

children.text: Yu Xiaoming's Post
My birthday is on 13th June.
children.cn: 我的生日是在六月十三日。
children.notes: on 13th June: 在六月十三日（具体日期前用介词on）
children.statement: 小明的生日在六月十三日。
children.explanation: 文章开头小明提到'My birthday is on 13th June.'。

children.text: On that day, I always eat birthday noodles with eggs.
children.cn: 在那天，我总是吃带鸡蛋的生日面。
children.notes: birthday noodles: 长寿面；with eggs: 带有鸡蛋
children.statement: 小明生日那天从来不吃面条。
children.explanation: 小明说'I always eat birthday noodles with eggs.'，表示他总是吃生日面。
children.highlight: On that day, always, eat, with eggs

children.text: Long noodles are a symbol of long life.
children.cn: 长面条是长寿的象征。
children.notes: a symbol of: ……的象征；long life: 长寿
children.statement: 在中国文化中，长面条象征着长寿。
children.explanation: 小明写道'Long noodles are a symbol of long life.'。

children.text: Every year, my family and I take a photo together under the big tree in our village.
children.cn: 每年，我的家人和我都会在我们村子的大树下拍一张合影。
children.notes: take a photo: 拍照；under the big tree: 在大树下；in our village: 在我们村子里
children.statement: 小明每年和家人一起在房间里拍照。
children.explanation: 他们是在村子的大树下（under the big tree in our village）拍照，不是在房间里。
children.keywords: Every year, family, take a photo, tree, village
children.highlight: Every year, take a photo, under, in our

children.text: I like taking photos because they help me remember fun times with my family.
children.cn: 我喜欢拍照，因为它们能帮我记住和家人在一起的欢乐时光。
children.notes: remember: 记住，回忆；fun times: 欢乐时光
children.statement: 小明喜欢拍照是因为拍照很有趣，能帮他留住和家人的美好回忆。
children.explanation: 他说'because they help me remember fun times with my family'。
children.keywords: like, taking photos, remember, fun times
children.highlight: like, because, help me, with my

children.text: This year, I want to plant a small tree for my 14th birthday.
children.cn: 今年，我想在我14岁生日时种一棵小树。
children.notes: plant a tree: 种树；14th birthday: 十四岁生日
children.statement: 小明计划在他15岁生日时种一棵小树。
children.explanation: 小明说他是为他的14岁生日（my 14th birthday）种一棵小树。
children.highlight: This year, want to, for my

children.text: I'd like to watch it grow with me.
children.cn: 我想看着它和我一起长大。
children.notes: I'd like to: 我想要；watch sb/sth do: 看着某人/某物做某事；grow with me: 和我一起成长
children.statement: 小明希望小树能够陪伴他一起成长。
children.explanation: 他说'I'd like to watch it grow with me.'，表达了共同成长的愿望。
children.highlight: I'd like to, watch it, grow with

children.text: When is your birthday? How do you celebrate it?
children.cn: 你的生日是什么时候？你通常怎么庆祝它？
children.notes: celebrate: 庆祝
children.statement: 小明在帖子的结尾向其他网友提问。
children.explanation: 小明提问'When is your birthday? How do you celebrate it?'以引起讨论。

children.text: Judy Clark's Post
It's a great idea to plant a tree for your birthday!
children.cn: 生日那天种一棵树是个很棒的主意！
children.notes: It's a great idea to do sth: 做某事是一个好主意
children.statement: 朱迪认为生日种树的主意非常糟糕。
children.explanation: 朱迪在回帖中说'It's a great idea to plant a tree...'，肯定了种树的主意。
children.highlight: It's a, to plant, for your

children.text: My birthday is on 28th July.
children.cn: 我的生日是在七月二十八日。
children.notes: on 28th July: 在七月二十八日
children.statement: 朱迪的生日在七月二十八日。
children.explanation: 朱迪明确写道'My birthday is on 28th July.'。

children.text: I usually have a party with my friends to celebrate.
children.cn: 我通常和我的朋友们一起开派对庆祝。
children.notes: usually: 通常；have a party: 开派对；celebrate: 庆祝
children.statement: 朱迪通常独自一人度过生日，不开派对。
children.explanation: 朱迪说她通常和朋友们一起开派对庆祝（have a party with my friends to celebrate）。
children.highlight: usually, have a, with my, to celebrate

children.text: My mother always makes my favourite chocolate cake.
children.cn: 我妈妈总是做我最喜欢的巧克力蛋糕。
children.notes: favourite: 最喜爱的；chocolate cake: 巧克力蛋糕
children.statement: 朱迪的妈妈总是买草莓蛋糕给她庆祝生日。
children.explanation: 她妈妈是亲自动手制作（makes）她最喜欢的巧克力蛋糕（chocolate cake）。

children.text: Everyone sings the 'Happy Birthday' song, and then I make a wish and blow out the candles.
children.cn: 每个人都唱起《祝你生日快乐》歌，然后我许个愿并吹灭蜡烛。
children.notes: sing the song: 唱歌；make a wish: 许个愿；blow out: 吹灭；candles: 蜡烛
children.statement: 朱迪在吹灭蜡烛前会先许愿。
children.explanation: 文章写道'I make a wish and blow out the candles'，说明是先许愿后吹蜡烛。
children.keywords: sing, song, make a wish, blow out, candles
children.highlight: sings the, and then, make a wish, blow out

children.text: Next, we enjoy the cake, and I open all my gifts.
children.cn: 接下来，我们享用蛋糕，并且我打开我所有的礼物。
children.notes: enjoy the cake: 享用蛋糕；open gifts: 打开礼物
children.statement: 吃完蛋糕后，朱迪会把礼物收起来不打开。
children.explanation: 朱迪说她会打开所有的礼物（open all my gifts）。

children.text: My father marks my height on the door every year.
children.cn: 我父亲每年都会在门上标记我的身高。
children.notes: mark height: 标记身高；on the door: 在门上；every year: 每年
children.statement: 朱迪的父亲每年在墙上记录她的身高。
children.explanation: 父亲是在门上（on the door）做标记，不是在墙上。
children.keywords: father, marks, height, door, every year
children.highlight: marks my, on the, every year

children.text: It's fun to look at the marks later.
children.cn: 以后看着这些标记很有趣。
children.notes: It's fun to do sth: 做某事很有趣；later: 以后，后来
children.statement: 朱迪觉得以后看那些身高标记很有意思。
children.explanation: 朱迪认为'It's fun to look at the marks later.'。
children.highlight: It's fun to, look at, later

children.text: Next time, I also want to do something different. Any good ideas?
children.cn: 下一次，我也想做些不同的事情。有什么好主意吗？
children.notes: different: 不同的
children.statement: 朱迪下一次还想用完全相同的方式过生日。
children.explanation: 朱迪说'I also want to do something different'（我也想做些不同的事情）。
